result.stdout:
Usage: kangaroo [command]

Kangaroo.CLI

Commands:
  range      Scans the configured range of IP addresses
  adapter    Scans IP address using the subnet on the provided adapter
  subnet     Scans the configured subnet, note only /16 - /24 is currently available

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

commands.payload:
Usage: kangaroo [command]

Kangaroo.CLI

Commands:
  range      Scans the configured range of IP addresses
  adapter    Scans IP address using the subnet on the provided adapter
  subnet     Scans the configured subnet, note only /16 - /24 is currently available

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: kangaroo adapter [--adapter <adapter>] [--timeout <timeout>] [--help]

Scans IP address using the subnet on the provided adapter

Options:
  -a, --adapter <adapter>    The network adapter to scan
  -t, --timeout <timeout>    Query timeout in milliseconds
  -h, --help                 Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: kangaroo adapter [--adapter <adapter>] [--timeout <timeout>] [--help]

Scans IP address using the subnet on the provided adapter

Options:
  -a, --adapter <adapter>    The network adapter to scan
  -t, --timeout <timeout>    Query timeout in milliseconds
  -h, --help                 Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: kangaroo range [--start <start>] [--end <end>] [--timeout <timeout>] [--help]

Scans the configured range of IP addresses

Options:
  -s, --start <start>        Starting IP address to begin scan with (Required)
  -e, --end <end>            Ending IP address to stop scan at (Required)
  -t, --timeout <timeout>    Query timeout in milliseconds
  -h, --help                 Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: kangaroo range [--start <start>] [--end <end>] [--timeout <timeout>] [--help]

Scans the configured range of IP addresses

Options:
  -s, --start <start>        Starting IP address to begin scan with (Required)
  -e, --end <end>            Ending IP address to stop scan at (Required)
  -t, --timeout <timeout>    Query timeout in milliseconds
  -h, --help                 Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: kangaroo subnet [--ip <i>] [--mask <end>] [--timeout <timeout>] [--help]

Scans the configured subnet, note only /16 - /24 is currently available

Options:
  -i, --ip <i>               IP Address matching the subnet mask provided (Required)
  -m, --mask <end>           Subnet mask to determine IP range scope (Required)
  -t, --timeout <timeout>    Query timeout in milliseconds
  -h, --help                 Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: kangaroo subnet [--ip <i>] [--mask <end>] [--timeout <timeout>] [--help]

Scans the configured subnet, note only /16 - /24 is currently available

Options:

  -m, --mask <end>           Subnet mask to determine IP range scope (Required)
  -t, --timeout <timeout>    Query timeout in milliseconds
  -h, --help                 Show help message
